subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, yet the people comprehend not. By God, the Day hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و القوم هم لایفقهون تالله قد اتی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
